data.name: Fight With Valkyries [18+]
data.detailed_description:
*Attenton
When play wth STEAM Deck. Select "Proton-7" to run the game

Developer says:

"This game emphasizes the beauty of combat and sex, inviting players to appreciate and savor the experience from an aesthetic perspective, delivering an unprecedented level of  impact."

Innovative "Free-Look-Slow-Motion" system

In order to make players more immersed, we developed this "free perspective slow motion" system. Players can travel around the arena and observe it freely, enjoying every wonderful close-up.

Worldview Background

In the convergence of the Nine Realms known as the "Midgard Rift," a war that shattered a thousand-year balance is raging. The Valkyries of Norse legend—once Odin's chosen guides of fallen warriors—now find themselves locked in a desperate battle against an infernal legion pouring forth from the abyss, as the prophecy of Ragnarök manifests prematurely.

Leading this demonic onslaught is Loki Shadowflame, a fallen god who has stolen the roots of Yggdrasil, the World Tree, and infused the creatures of the underworld with forbidden chaos magic, transforming them into light-devouring "Eclipseborn."

And you—an unnamed champion summoned by the Valkyrie Queen Brynhildr with her dying divine power—are the key to turning the tide of war…

In this game, you will train with Valkyries:

In this game, you will have sex with Valkyries:

In this game, you will fight with Valkyries, against devil girls:

In this game, you will punish devil girls:

Unlock the Valkyries, train with them, fight with them, and have sex with them:

data.short_description: As a Spartan champion, fight alongside Valkyries against hell's invasion. Crush demonic legions, then dominate the defiant devil girls . Steel meets sorcery in this brutal clash of gods and monsters."
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit
  • 處理器: NIL4 core / 8 threads | Intel Core i7-7700 | Ryzen 5 1400
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 8GB VRAM | GTX 1070 | Radeon RX 580
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit
  • 處理器: NIL4 core / 8 threads | Intel Core i5 11600K | Ryzen 5 5600X
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 8GB VRAM | RTX2070 | RX 6700 XT
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 8GB VRAM | GTX 1070 | Radeon RX 580
